level_signals: 6–11 years in management consulting, investment banking, and/or operating roles
Partners directly with leaders across Product and GTM
High degree of autonomy in prioritizing what matters most

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6–11 years in management consulting, investment banking, and/or operating roles (BizOps, Strategy & Ops, Finance)
Comfort with ambiguity and a high degree of autonomy in prioritizing what matters most
Ability to build relationships at all levels and drive cross-functional consensus
Driving the strategic and operational agenda for a Product or GTM organization — and the cross-functional initiatives that come with it
Owning foundational operating rhythms — monthly business reports, QBRs, OKRs and KPIs, executive reporting — and evolving them as the business scales
Building out dashboards, metrics, and success measures that give leadership visibility and enable data-driven decisions
Partnering on product strategy topics including pricing, commercialization, and go-to-market for new and existing products
Using AI tools and agents as a default part of how you work — not as an experiment, but as a force multiplier

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Familiarity with AI tools and agents to accelerate workflows is a plus
Knowledge of SQL and Tableau preferred
Experience in fintech, payments, or high-growth SaaS preferred

scope.surface: BizOps team supporting Product and GTM organizations across Plaid's largest revenue lines and critical partnerships
scope.business_model: B2B fintech data network / API platform
primary_metrics_inferred: OKRs and KPIs for Product and GTM orgs
core_responsibilities: Driving the strategic and operational agenda for a Product or GTM organization
Owning foundational operating rhythms — monthly business reports, QBRs, OKRs and KPIs, executive reporting
Building out dashboards, metrics, and success measures
Partnering on product strategy topics including pricing, commercialization, and go-to-market
Using AI tools and agents as a default part of how you work

green_flags: Clear career launchpad narrative: 'past team members have gone on to leadership roles in Product, GTM, and operational functions'
Explicit encouragement to apply even if experience doesn't fully match the JD
Broad cross-functional scope provides high visibility and impact
Small, high-impact team signals lean/efficient culture
red_flags: Location type not specified in JD body — unclear if hybrid, remote, or onsite

Tension between AI tools appearing in both must-haves (unconditional bullet under Responsibilities) and nice-to-haves ('is a plus' in Qualifications) — treated as hard for the usage mandate and soft for the explicit 'plus' qualifier
